---
title: "draft1"
format: html
---

```{r}
# R packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Data
library(ipumsr)
ddi <- read_ipums_ddi("data/ahtus_00001.xml")
df <- read_ipums_micro(ddi)
```

```{r}
# Paid, Unpaid, and Childcare Work by Sex (2018)

# Set stacking order for the bars
# First level = bottom of the bar
# Desired order: childcare (bottom), unpaid (middle), paid (top)
summary_data$work_type <- factor(
  summary_data$work_type,
  levels = c("childcare", "unpaid", "paid")  # <-- CHANGE ORDER HERE
)

ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = sex_label, y = hours, fill = work_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Paid, Unpaid, and Childcare Work by Sex (2018)",
    x = "Sex",
    y = "Average Hours per Day",
    fill = "Work Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "childcare" = "red",     # bottom
      "unpaid" = "orange",       # middle
      "paid" = "gray"          # top
    ),
    labels = c(
      "childcare" = "Childcare",
      "unpaid" = "Unpaid Domestic Work",
      "paid" = "Paid Work"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# Unpaid Domestic Work by Sex (1930-2018)

filtered_data <- df %>%
  filter(
    CIVSTAT == 1,
    HHTYPE == 1,
    UNDER18 >= 1,
    AGE >= 22 & AGE <= 40,
    EDUC %in% c(5, 6),
    AGEYNGST >= 0 & AGEYNGST <= 18,
    SEX %in% c(1, 2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex_label = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Male", "Female"),
    ACT_UNDOM_HRS = ACT_UNDOM / 60
  )

# Average hours by year and sex
summary_data <- filtered_data %>%
  group_by(YEAR, sex_label) %>%
  summarise(avg_domestic_hours = mean(ACT_UNDOM_HRS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Line plot
ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = YEAR, y = avg_domestic_hours, color = sex_label)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Unpaid Domestic Work by Sex (1930 - 2018)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Hours per Day",
    color = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Male" = "steelblue", "Female" = "salmon"))

# Note for 2018
# 2.72 hrs for female
# 1.57 hrs for male
```
